project.title: AI Content Backend
project.description: AI-powered content generation: a brief becomes a retrieval-augmented prompt, an LLM produces a draft, and the result is stored with embeddings for later reuse.

flow.title: Brief-to-Draft Flow
flow.description: A brief enters, relevant context is retrieved from a vector store, a prompt is built and sent to the LLM, the draft is post-processed, embedded and stored.

domains.name: Retrieval
domains.description: Vector search over previous content and tenant knowledge.

domains.name: Generation
domains.description: Prompt build, LLM call and post-processing.

steps.title: Submit Brief
steps.description: Tenant submits a brief: topic, tone, length, target audience.

steps.title: Retriever
steps.description: Embeds the brief and searches the vector store for related prior content for the same tenant.

steps.title: Vector Store
steps.description: Indexed embeddings of prior drafts and tenant-supplied source material.

steps.title: Prompt Builder
steps.description: Assembles the final prompt: brief + retrieved context + tone instructions.

steps.title: LLM Call
steps.description: Calls the language-model provider with the assembled prompt.

steps.title: Post-Processor
steps.description: Cleans up formatting, runs a uniqueness check against past drafts and computes the embedding of the final draft.

steps.title: Draft Store
steps.description: Keeps the final draft linked to its brief and to the context passages used.

steps.title: Draft Response
steps.description: Returns the draft to the client with provenance (which passages, which model, when).
